injuries.comment: Marchment did not play in Sunday's (Dec. 14) game against the Sabres.
The Kraken said that Dunn didn't participate in Monday's (Dec. 15) practice, per Sound of Hockey.
Head coach Lane Lambert said that Kakko is dealing with an illness but thinks he should be good to go for Tuesday's (Dec. 16) game against the Avalanche, per Sound of Hockey.
